image_083f8692c41ab9.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\frac{\\log\\alpha+\\log\\beta}{\\log a}=\\frac{\\log\\alpha}{\\log a}+\\frac{\\log\\beta}{\\log a}","note":"對數換底與分式拆分"}

image_04028e3e6c4bd5.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=3\\left(\\frac{\\log \\alpha}{\\log a}\\right)+2\\left(\\frac{\\log \\beta}{\\log a}\\right)=3\\log_a \\alpha+2\\log_a \\beta","note":"對數換底公式運算"}

image_0924972f328ebf.png.latex: \log d=18.5\log k=11\log k+7.5\log k=2\log a+\log b
image_0924972f328ebf.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log d=18.5\\log k=11\\log k+7.5\\log k=2\\log a+\\log b","note":"對數等式"}

image_098cfa417f40cb.png.note: 對數式與指數式的轉換
image_098cfa417f40cb.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_c a=2\\Rightarrow a=c^2","note":"對數式與指數式的轉換"}

image_12493d15356f9b.png.latex: -\frac{\log c^2+\log c^3}{\log c}=\frac{2\log c+3\log c}{\log c}=5\ne6
image_12493d15356f9b.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"-\\frac{\\log c^2+\\log c^3}{\\log c}=\\frac{2\\log c+3\\log c}{\\log c}=5\\ne6","note":"對數運算等式"}

image_2fcbf419be0279.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_c(ab)=\\frac{\\log(ab)}{\\log c}=\\frac{\\log a+\\log b}{\\log c}","note":"對數換底與乘積性質"}

image_42aa943e6e8dfe.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"f\\left(\\frac{1}{\\alpha}\\right)=\\log_a\\frac{1}{\\alpha}=\\frac{\\log\\frac{1}{\\alpha}}{\\log a}=\\frac{-\\log\\alpha}{\\log a}","note":"對數換底與倒數性質"}

image_3d6109116d04b8.png.note: 對數乘法性質的等式片段
image_3d6109116d04b8.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\log a+\\log b=\\log ab","note":"對數乘法性質的等式片段"}

image_46c9b18ccbdf86.png.note: 指數與對數互逆的化簡

image_4dcc00e3c98f6b.png.note: 指數與對數等式及不等式

image_66992703825dc1.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log c=13\\log k=5.5\\log k+7.5\\log k","note":"對數等式"}

image_6bdb34d22da453.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_k a=5.5\\Rightarrow \\frac{\\log a}{\\log k}=5.5\\Rightarrow \\log a=5.5\\log k","note":"對數換底公式推導"}

image_7124b958c78511.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_k e=26\\Rightarrow \\frac{\\log e}{\\log k}=26\\Rightarrow \\log e=26\\log k","note":"對數換底公式推導"}

image_73e8defafec143.png.note: 非數學內容，像是終端機錯誤訊息
image_73e8defafec143.png.raw: {"class":"diagram","latex":"[KEEP_AS_IMAGE]","note":"非數學內容，像是終端機錯誤訊息"}

image_787a256fdd230a.png.note: 換底公式與根號指數化簡

image_7f1e534a5cc176.png.note: 對數與函數值相加的等式

image_86b623769c8418.png.note: 分貝與強度的對數公式

image_89aae922e3f9fb.png.latex: \log_b a=\frac{\log a}{\log b}=-\frac{\log c^2}{\log c^3}=\frac{2\log c}{3\log c}=-\frac{2}{3}
image_89aae922e3f9fb.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_b a=\\frac{\\log a}{\\log b}=-\\frac{\\log c^2}{\\log c^3}=\\frac{2\\log c}{3\\log c}=-\\frac{2}{3}","note":"對數換底公式計算"}

image_8edc970c87331b.png.note: 對數換底公式與大小比較

image_95cc9e7ebad081.png.note: 對數換底公式推導片段
image_95cc9e7ebad081.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\beta\\left(\\frac{\\log \\alpha}{\\log a}\\right)=\\beta\\log_a\\alpha=\\beta f(\\alpha)","note":"對數換底公式推導片段"}

image_9d712543ea9cdc.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log e=26\\log k=2\\log c=\\log c^2\\Rightarrow e=c^2","note":"對數等式推得 e=c^2"}

image_ac3b65866da599.png.note: 不等式 a 大於 b

image_a94e945e765ab7.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_k b=7.5\\Rightarrow \\frac{\\log b}{\\log k}=7.5\\Rightarrow \\log b=7.5\\log k","note":"對數換底公式推導"}

image_c4e5c667a199df.png.note: 對數換底公式的等式片段
image_c4e5c667a199df.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=-\\left(\\frac{\\log \\alpha}{\\log a}\\right)=-\\log_a \\alpha=-f(\\alpha)","note":"對數換底公式的等式片段"}

image_e539d4526bca58.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\log_a\\left(\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}\\right)=\\frac{\\log\\left(\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}\\right)}{\\log a}=\\frac{\\log\\alpha-\\log\\beta}{\\log a}","note":"對數換底與商數性質"}

image_ee1c77f672ef09.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_k c = 13 \\Rightarrow \\frac{\\log c}{\\log k}=13 \\Rightarrow \\log c = 13\\log k","note":"對數換底公式推導"}

image_efdd9704bb0b8b.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_k d=18.5\\Rightarrow\\frac{\\log d}{\\log k}=18.5\\Rightarrow\\log d=18.5\\log k","note":"對數換底公式推導"}

image_f0d7538088bcf5.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"f(\\alpha^\\beta)=\\log_a\\left(\\alpha^\\beta\\right)=\\frac{\\log \\alpha^\\beta}{\\log a}=\\frac{\\beta\\log \\alpha}{\\log a}","note":"對數換底公式推導"}

image_f90e981bf1178e.png.note: 純數學式：推出 c 等於 ab
image_f90e981bf1178e.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\Rightarrow c=ab","note":"純數學式：推出 c 等於 ab"}

image_ff8f973710cec4.png.note: 對數方程式推得 b 的值
image_ff8f973710cec4.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log b=16\\to b=10^{16}","note":"對數方程式推得 b 的值"}
